verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes Pipedrive as a sales CRM platform for managing leads, deals, activities, and sales pipelines, which aligns with the recorded description.
The official API documentation confirms that API token (personal API key) and OAuth2 are supported authentication methods.
The developer documentation states that each Pipedrive user has an API token that can be found in Personal preferences, indicating self-serve access to credentials.
The API reference confirms that Pipedrive provides a comprehensive REST API covering core product objects.
The existence of public REST API documentation and the ability to obtain a personal API token without human approval confirms that integrations can be built today.
